data.title: White Paper: Power Grid Private Wireless Network -- The Future of Critical Communication in the Power Sector
data.description: In Rio de Janeiro on April 14, 2026, it was reported that the Brazilian power sector is currently experiencing a digital transformation, which is being fueled by two key factors: the modernization of infrastructure and the widespread incorporation of renewable energy sources. This shift towards digitalization is revolutionizing the sector's operations, with an emphasis on enhancing critical communication.

data.title: Alliance of Channel Women Announces Winners of 2025 LEAD, INSPIRE and EMPOWER Awards
data.description: Six women in leadership positions were honored for their contributions to boosting channel growth and supporting and motivating women at the ACWConnect Live event in Orange, California and Las Vegas on April 13, 2026. The Alliance of Channel Women, a non-profit entity focused on advancing women's careers, facilitated the recognition of these influential figures.

data.title: Alliance of Channel Women Announces Winners of 2025 Volunteer and Sponsor Awards
data.description: During the ACWConnect Live event in Las Vegas on April 13, 2026, the Alliance of Channel Women acknowledged the outstanding contributions of 3 volunteers and 5 sponsors within the ACW community. This not-for-profit organization focuses on advancing female technology channel leaders. The winners were celebrated for their dedication and support towards this mission.

data.title: Optomec Launches Aerosol Jet Education Platform to Train Next-Generation Engineers
data.description: Albuquerque, New Mexico - Optomec, a prominent company in the field of additive manufacturing technology, has introduced the Aerosol Jet Education Platform. This innovative platform is designed to enhance education and training in 3D manufacturing. The platform offers a comprehensive solution that includes both hardware and software components. This launch signifies Optomec's commitment to advancing education in this sector.
